section_6_findings.title: FR "CFP Cash Top-up" RM 22,868.50 mis-stated.
section_6_findings.body: Cash CFP top-up cell on FR shows RM 22,868.50 yet only one CFP top-up exists today (TTCFP slip 12 RM 967.50 via Maybank) — a bank transfer, not cash. The figure 22,868.50 is close to BUDI95 cash sales (RM 22,185.67) and appears to be a wrong-cell entry. Distorts cash-balance view by RM 22,868.50.
section_6_findings.action: Have HANISAH correct the FR — set Cash CFP Top-up to 0; show the RM 967.50 only under Instant Transfer (CFP). Re-issue FR.

section_6_findings.title: Eight TT-NonCFP slips RM 401.50 unmatched in 25/04 AmBank pool.
section_6_findings.body: Slips 05, 08, 09, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 22 (RM 40, 78, 30, 73.50, 50, 15, 50, 50, 50 = RM 436.50) have no corresponding credit in the AmBank 8881058618146 25/04 printout. Only 4 of 13 TTNonCFP slips reconcile (RM 88 confirmed).
section_6_findings.action: Re-fetch AmBank 8146 printout covering full day 25/04 (current pool may be only morning portion). Verify against next-day 26/04 printout; flag any still missing as unverified revenue.

section_6_findings.title: Merchant fuel POS vs FR variance RM 410.47.
section_6_findings.body: POS Credit Card MOP RM 1,483.77 includes BUDI95 credit-card payment RM 485.64; FR Merchant Settlement aggregates RM 1,073.30 (380 + 688.30 + 5). The two reconcile after BUDI95 split (1,483.77 − 485.64 = 998.13 vs 1,073.30 = +75.17 still unexplained).
section_6_findings.action: Reconcile BUDI95 merchant component against AmBank EDC settlement; investigate 75.17 residual.

section_6_findings.title: Cash closing variance RM 131.43 short.
section_6_findings.body: Computed closing 11,586.61 vs FR 11,455.18. Cash revenue per POS 33,568.67 + mart 144.70 vs FR-stated 33,961.74 + 144.70 also differs (POS short 248.37).
section_6_findings.action: Recount cash drawer; reconcile Shift A (BAL −10,759.33 incl. floats) and Shift B (BAL −2,550.91) closing balances; explain shift-handover float movements.

section_6_findings.title: Fuel delivery dipping incomplete.
section_6_findings.body: 25/04 delivery 22,000 L (Petrol 16,500 + Diesel 5,500) per IPTBINV26007433. Dipping report shows only one petrol tank's stock-in change (5,572 L), but the delivery is split across Tanks 1, 2, 3, 4 per handwritten note. Receiving evidence does not document each-tank intake.
section_6_findings.action: Have site-staff record per-tank before/after dipping for every multi-tank delivery; cross-foot to delivery ticket QTY.

section_6_findings.title: GreenPOS vs FR fuel grand-total variance RM 17.40.
section_6_findings.body: POS RM 48,542.40 vs FR RM 48,525.00. FR shows "Crash 0" reconciliation.
section_6_findings.action: Verify if FR adjustment "−20.00 / Check 0.001" relates; bring GreenPOS report and FR cell into agreement.

section_6_findings.title: §6.11 clearance verification — DEFERRED.
section_6_findings.body: AmBank 8881058618135/146 25/04 printout covers only ~06:00–09:56 narrow window (8 credits). Maybank 510161015366/etc 25/04 printout not yet available. Of 25 slips: 4 verified, 9 unmatched (likely outside printout window), 8 G4S Safeguard partial-credit, 4 deferred (Merchant T+1 settlement and TTCFP via MBB).
section_6_findings.action: Re-run §6.11 once 26/04 printouts arrive for AMB 8146/8135 full-day and MBB 5101/5601/5601 covering 25/04 value date.

section_6_findings.title: §6.12 aggregation integrity — variances flagged.
section_6_findings.body: Cash-in-today FR 11,237.94 vs computed 11,586.61 (+348.67) and Cash CFP Top-up 22,868.50 (vs slip 967.50 / bank-transfer) are aggregation/labeling exceptions. Safeguard, Instant Transfer (CFP), Instant Transfer (Non-CFP), and Merchant aggregate sums all reconcile to slips RM 22,344.00 / 967.50 / 524.50 / 1,073.30 — clean on those four lines.
section_6_findings.action: Correct FR cash cells; re-issue FR; the four reconciling lines stay clean.
